new_repair_hint: Group the transactions by period to calculate the mean bill amount.

FROM master_txn_table
JOIN customers ON master_txn_table.Customers = customers.customer_name
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID
WHERE customers.customer_full_name = 'Shaun Bruce' AND employees.Employee_name = 'Eddie Harrison'
GROUP BY strftime('%Y', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) AS period
